name: show_case_details
description: Show one Cieden case study by id or by industry. Use when the user asks for a specific case, cases in their industry, or details of one project. Pass id (e.g. sitenna, lykon, wealth-management) or filter (e.g. fintech, healthcare) to narrow.

id.description: Case study id (e.g. sitenna, lykon, wealth-management)

filter.description: Industry or domain keyword (e.g. fintech, healthcare, AI)
